title: fornicium lyratum
intro: Fornicium lyratum is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Celastraceae. It is native to China and is also known as the 'Horned Staff' due to its unique branched twigs. Fornicium lyratum is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or used in traditional Chinese medicine to help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and digestive issues.
